NET_WORTH_LOCKED: The Net Worth section is locked
EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your email to continue
EMAIL_TAKEN: An account with this email already exists
OAUTH_NO_EMAIL: This provider did not return an email address
CREDIT_ACCOUNT_REQUIRED: Pick an account to reflect this in your balances
SIGNIN_SESSION_EXPIRED: Your sign-in session expired. Please sign in again.
CODE_INCORRECT: That code is incorrect or expired
CODE_INCORRECT_RETRY: That code is incorrect or expired. Try again.
VERIFICATION_LINK_INVALID: This verification link is invalid or has expired
TRANSFER_SAME_ACCOUNT: Source and destination accounts must differ
IMPORT_NO_DATA_ROWS: The file has a header row but no data rows
TWO_FA_PASSWORD_REQUIRED: Your password is required to disable 2FA
TWO_FA_CODE_REQUIRED: A valid authentication code is required to disable 2FA
TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS: Too many attempts. Request a new code.
RESET_LINK_INVALID: This reset link is invalid or has expired
